topic: A For Sale sign appears in my yard at night, listing me as the seller with a sold date.
title: A For Sale Sign Appeared in My Yard | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: A For Sale sign appeared in my yard at night, listing me as the seller.
scenes.image_prompt: A real estate For Sale sign standing in a dim front yard at dusk, fog, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I had owned the house outright for eleven years.
scenes.image_prompt: A modest house behind a neat lawn in fading evening light, dim glow, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The house was never for sale.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty front yard with a faint depression in the grass at twilight, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I pulled the sign up and threw it in the shed.
scenes.image_prompt: A For Sale sign lying inside a dim cluttered shed, faint light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By dawn it stood in the yard again.
scenes.image_prompt: A For Sale sign upright in a dewy front lawn at dawn, gray fog, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now it carried a sold sticker, with a date already on it.
scenes.image_prompt: A For Sale sign with a red SOLD banner across it in a dim yard, twilight, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I called the number printed at the bottom.
scenes.image_prompt: A phone held up before a real estate sign at dusk, dim glow, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My own voice answered and said the deal was nearly done.
scenes.image_prompt: A dim front porch with a glowing phone screen, fog, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Boxes I never packed appeared stacked by my door.
scenes.image_prompt: Sealed cardboard moving boxes stacked beside a front door at dusk, dim light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The sold date on the sign was tomorrow.
scenes.image_prompt: A close view of a SOLD real estate sign showing a date, dim twilight, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sat awake all night watching the door.
scenes.image_prompt: A silhouette seated facing a front door in a dark room, faint streetlight, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At dawn new owners had keys, and asked who I was.
scenes.image_prompt: Unfamiliar figures standing on a porch at dawn holding keys, backs turned, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
